description_long: This is a modern, box-shaped two-story house with a flat roof and a minimalist design. The front facade is painted black and features three large windows with white frames, a white door, and a small hedge along the base. The side and rear exteriors are light gray with vertical paneling, punctuated by a few windows of varying sizes and a black accent stripe. The property includes a small green lawn, a driveway with a white car, and landscaping elements such as tall conical trees and a leafy deciduous tree. The house appears to have a simple, functional layout with visible interior walls and rooms. The overall aesthetic is clean and contemporary, with an emphasis on geometric lines and contrasting colors.
description: A modern, two-story box-shaped house with a flat roof, black and gray exterior, large windows, and minimalist landscaping including trees and a driveway.
description_view_0: Front view shows the black facade, three large windows, white door, hedge, and a white car parked on the driveway.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the light gray vertical paneling, black accent stripe, several windows, and two tall conical trees with a black car parked nearby.
description_view_2: Rear view displays more light gray paneling, two windows, a tree, and utility bins near the back wall.
description_view_3: Right side view highlights the black wall, three tall conical trees, and a leafy tree on the lawn.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple white door with no overhang, flush with facade, flanked by windows and a low hedge
